# Ars Festum

> Event design house in Palma de Mallorca, founded in 2003. Flowers, furnishings,
> lighting, artistic direction and counsel held in-house. What we propose is what we
> install, without substitution.

Ars Festum designs and installs private events across Mallorca. The studio works from
a single principle: every event begins as a drawing, and the drawing is what gets
built. Floral, technical and production work is held in-house, with no subcontracted
assembly.

## Facts

- Name: Ars Festum
- Founded: 2003
- Location: Palma de Mallorca, Illes Balears, Spain
- Area served: Mallorca
- Founder: Nadja Rothkirch
- Held in-house: Flowers, Furnishings, Lighting, Artistic Direction, Counsel
- Contact: info@arsfestum.com · +34 971 22 73 68
- Access: by appointment, by referral

## Venues

Over 20 years across private estates, fincas, hotels and historic venues on the
island, including La Fortaleza, Cap Rocat, Castillo Bendinat, Son Marroig,
Can Simoneta, Son Bunyola and Four Seasons Mallorca.

## Links

- Home: https://arsfestum.com/
- Gallery (Instagram): https://www.instagram.com/ars_festum/
- Catalogue: https://arsfestum.com/catalogue/ars-festum-catalogue.pdf

## Press

Featured in Vogue, Harper's Bazaar, Hello!, ¡Hola! and Bild.
